title: Negative Test - Attempt to pause trial with no network connection
description: Test the app's behavior when a user tries to pause their trial without an internet connection.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.
3. On the pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: An appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'No internet connection'). The trial status remains 'Active'.
